titleStmt.title: SII 23.387: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 387. (A.R. No. 387 of 1907.) Maruttuvakkuḍi, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Airāvatēśvara temple—on the same wall Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ: year 21

summary.p: This seems to be an inscription of Rājarāja III and it refers to the fixation of rent in paddy accruing from the lands now granted, in the 40th year of Āḻvāṉ by which is evidently meant the predecessor king Kulōttuṅga III. The inscription records the royal order to the tax-officers to grant the uḷvari to the temple of Tiruviḍaikkuḷam-uḍaiyār at Āṉaichchūḻ remitting the iṟai (rent) due from four fields measuring 11 vēli and odd in extent in all. The income in paddy thus granted to the temple is said to have amounted to 476 and odd kalam. The Tirumandira-ōlai issuing the order was Mīnavaṉ-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koṉeriṉmai ko
ṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭut tiraimur nāṭ
ṭu Āṉaiccūḻ Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaikkuḷamuṭaiyār ko
yiliṟ tevakaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvā
rkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañ ceyvāṉukkum Ittevarkku veṇ
ṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku vatāka jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa vaḷa
ṭacoḻac caruppeti
Iṟukkiṟa nilattut teva
tāṉa Iṟaiyili lattuk kuṟumpil nāṭṭu I tūyaperumāḷ caru
ppetimaṅkalattoṭuṅ kūṭiṉa nilamāy māṟiṉa nilam Oṉṟaraiye mākāṇi muntiri
kaikkiḻ muṉṟumāvukkum cervillāmaiyil māṟiṉa nilam Oṉṟe muk kāle nālumākkā
ṇi muntirikaikkum tevarkku Iṟuttapaṭikku koyiṟkaṇakkup perumpuliyūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻutti
ṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭip paṟṟukkokka Iṭaveṇṭum nilattukku Uyyak koṇ
ṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūr
ppetimaṅkalattut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāna nilattukku Ūrkkaṇakku kaṇ
ṇamaṅkala muṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi nilattu brahma- teyam tirukku
mukkuḷḷinum kūṭiṉa nilattu Iraṇṭu mākkāṇi Arai
kkāṇikkiḻ Araiye muṉṟumāvum vikkirama caruppetimaṅkalatti ni
ṉṟuṅ kūṭiṉa nilattu nilam nāle Oṉpatu māvaraiyiṉ kiḻ mukkāle muṉṟumā
kkāṇiyum Āka nilam patiṉoṉṟe Āṟumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ A
raiye mākāṇiyum Irupattoṉṟāvatu pacāṉa mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyi liyāka I
ṭṭum Innilattukku Iṟai kaṭṭum niccayippumāṉa pālā
koḷḷak kāṇikkaṭaṉ veli Oṉṟukku nellu nūṟṟukkalat
tiṉ kalamāka Iṟaikaṭṭiyum Iṉṉilattukku Āḻvāṉukku nāṟppatā
taṇṭa niccayitta nellilt tarappaṭi Iṟuttu varukiṟa nellil nala
llu nāṉūṟṟu Eḻupattaṟu
tāka variyilārum varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari tarac coṉṉom
Irupattoṉṟāvatu pacāṉa mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka kaik koṇṭu
ttappaṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai miṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.387 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
